_comment: Example profile for MIMIC-IV CLIF (MIMIC-IV-Ext-CLIF, ~v1.1.0). Copy to sites/mimic.json (gitignored) and set data_path to your local MIMIC CLIF directory. Run: ./run_bundle.sh --site mimic. NOTE timezone UTC — MIMIC *_dttm are UTC and date-shifted, so temporal-trend axes are not real calendar dates (all-time/distributional comparisons are valid). All 4 metrics run as-is; vocabulary matches the canonical definitions/ with no overrides.
